name: Rich Perry
abstract: Rich Perry is an American jazz tenor saxophonist from Cleveland, Ohio. Perry attended Bowling Green State University for a year before moving to New York.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Sweet Lorraine: A Jazz Celebration for the Village Vanguard
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: Jeff Beal's The Cabinet of Dr. Caligari
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: The Cabinet of Dr. Caligari (with new score by Jeff Beal)

about_quotes.speaker: Mark Soskin
about_quotes.evidence: tonight I’m playing with an amazing tenor saxophone player, Rich Perry. And you know we’re doing all my music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mark Soskin interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 17, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Konitz Lee
about_quotes.evidence: There were some nice moments with Rich Perry... On that record when we improvised together
about_quotes.doc_title: Konitz Lee — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Harold Danko
about_quotes.evidence: I knew my fingers aren’t on all the notes there... and with Rich Perry, Rich Perry is going to be Rich Perry and we hired him because of his great sound
about_quotes.doc_title: Harold Danko interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 28, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: Rich Perry’s on the rest, along with Mulgrew Miller, Jay Anderson, and Victor Lewis.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
